title: Skateboard
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:UnidentifiedSkywalkerWithSkateboard-JediLessons.jpg|thumb|right|An unspecified Skywalker holds up a skateboard.]]
{{Quote|WOOHOO!!!|[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]|<ref name="Jedi Lessons">[[Star Wars Kids (1997) 3|''Star Wars Kids'' (1997) 3]]</ref>}}
A '''skateboard''' was a single-being wheeled vehicle.

It was light enough to be carried by a young [[Human/Legends|Human]], and could be used to perform acrobatic maneuvers.

[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] once confiscated a skateboard from a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] named Skywalker, and subsequently used the vehicle himself. He apparently found the experience quite enjoyable.

==Behind the scenes==
In an interview discussing [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']], [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] Chairman Allan Horn joked, "I've learned to be very careful about Star Wars. If I say, 'There will be no skateboards in Star Wars'... that gets headlines."<ref>{{WebCite|url=https://variety.com/2014/film/news/star-wars-casting-star-wars-abu-dhabi-1201160927|text=Disney's Alan Horn on Mastering the 'Star Wars'-ian Look'|work=variety.com|archivedate=20190811090055}}</ref>
